name: Ahlstrom-Munksjo Oyj
summary: Ahlstrom-Munksj√É¬∂ Oyj manufactures and sells fiber-based materials, and supplies sustainable solutions worldwide. It operates through five segments: Decor, Filtration and Performance, Industrial Solutions, North America Specialty Solutions, and Specialties. The Decor segment develops and produces paper-based surfacing for wood-based materials, such as laminate flooring, furniture, and interiors. The Filtration and Performance segment develops and produces filtration materials for engine oils, fuels, and air, as well as industrial filtration products. This segment also provides glass fiber for flooring products and wind turbine blades, as well as nonwoven materials for automotive, construction, textile and hygiene, and wall cover material applications. The Industrial Solutions segment offers abrasive backings, electro-technical insulation papers, release liners, and coated specialty papers. This segment also supplies fine art and printing papers, as well as thin papers, specialty pulp, and balancing foil paper. The North America Specialty Solutions segment provides a range of specialized materials that protect and enhance the performance of industrial and consumer applications, such as release liners, tapes, interleaving papers, and specialty paper. The Specialties segment provides materials for food and beverage processing, laboratory filters and life science diagnostics, water filtration, tape products, and medical fabrics. This segment also supplies hot cooking oil and milk filtration materials, and graphics paper for sticky notes and envelopes, as well as metallized labels and flexible packaging papers. It primarily serves food and beverage processing and packaging, transportation, homebuilding, furniture, and health care and life science industries. The company was formerly known as Munksj√É¬∂ Oyj and changed its name to Ahlstrom-Munksj√É¬∂ Oyj in March 2017. Ahlstrom-Munksj√É¬∂ Oyj was founded in 1862 and is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.
